form.formComment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional, going on to clock 30.24 in a 2.5 lengths win at this track over 530m. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Wentworth Park (30.21) in a NG, finishing a 12 length sixth. Yet to miss the frame from four starts from the draw, including two wins. Looks suited and should go close.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time when sixth (30.60) at this track. Prior to that had been racing well. Has a low draw but prefer the place this line-up.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording four placings in a row, before finishing fourth (30.18) at Geelong last start. Tends to run fairly well off the tricky draw but prefer the place this line-up.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won easily by 8 lengths at this track (30.23) beating Woodside Frankie in a Invitation on April 2. Not keen this time.

form.formComment: Scored by 1.5 lengths last time (30.43) in a Grade 2/3/4 over 530m at this track. Has two wins and three placings from eight starts from the draw. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Placed last time (30.43) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing second and beaten 2.5 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 2.25 lengths over 530m at this track in a handy 30.58, beating Forgery. Looks well placed and should be tough to beat.
